title: aspidosperma megalocarpon subsp. curranii
intro: Aspidosperma megalocarpon subsp. curranii is a plant species, also known as the Philippine peruvieria or Curran's Peruvieria, which belongs to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its alkaloid content, which has been studied for its potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Aspidosperma megalocarpon subsp. curranii include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help in managing conditions such as fever, pain, and infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by extracting its alkaloids and combining them with other medicinal herbs to create remedies for various ailments.
